text:
--- Page 4 ---
INVESTIGATION 2:
Let's compare the marketing and the ingredient list
on a package of crème fraîche:
CHALLENGE: BECOME A LABEL EXPERT!
The next time you go shopping, analyze a label by trying to spot ingredients with strange names, additives, and marketing traps. You'll see, it's a real detective game!
• 9 INGREDIENTS!
A "classic" cream has 2 or
3 at most
(cream + lactic cultures)
• 5 ADDITIVES! Including
2 emulsifiers: pectin,
cellulose, cellulose gum, E471, E472
CONCLUSION OF THE INVESTIGATION:
It's probably tasty because there are many additives, but this type of product should be consumed in moderation, especially in the case of IBD. A lot of information praising the product's quality. It's better to choose a classic cream.
Produced with the support of
